studyName: Cystic Fibrosis Nasal Epithelium Gene Expression by RNAseq

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: D134
variables.description: Coorelation of a sample to the mean of all other samples based on all expressed genes

variables.description: Sample projections to PC#1, from PCA analysis of the gene expression data

variables.description: Sample projections to PC#2, from PCA analysis of the gene expression data

variables.description: Sample projections to PC#3, from PCA analysis of the gene expression data

variables.name: LEEKSV.1
variables.description: Surrogate variable 1

variables.name: LEEKSV.2
variables.description: Surrogate variable 2

variables.name: LOG2.CD45
variables.description: Expression values of the gene CD45, as log2FPKM

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SITE
variables.description: Clinical trial participating institution

variables.name: VISIT
variables.description: Number of clinical visit when sample was collected

variables.name: Azithromycin
variables.description: Whether patient was taking azithromycin at the time of sample collection

variables.name: Final Avg Age
variables.description: Average age of lung function (FEV1) measured, which were used in calculate the standardized lung function score, KNoRMA

variables.name: KNoRMA
variables.description: Standardized lung function score as Kulich survival-adjusted mortality-adjusted normalized score

variables.name: Nasal Steroids
variables.description: Whether patient was taking nasal steroid at time of sample collection

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: TRANSPLANT
variables.description: Whether patient had undergone transplant

variables.name: deltaFF
variables.description: Whether CFTR mutation is F508d homozygote

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group by Institutional Certification

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex
